document_text: Effective from the next billing cycle, customers who maintain a minimum average balance of $1,500 in their checking account will be exempt from the standard $12 monthly maintenance fee. Customers who fall below this threshold in any given month will be charged the fee on their next statement. Customers can view their average balance calculation in the mobile app under Account Details.

In the event of a disputed transaction, customers have 60 days from the statement date on which the transaction first appeared to file a formal dispute. Disputes filed after this window may not be eligible for reversal under our standard policy, though exceptions may be granted at the discretion of the fraud investigation team on a case-by-case basis for extenuating circumstances.

Personal loan applicants must have a minimum credit score of 650, a debt-to-income ratio below 43%, and at least two years of verifiable employment history to qualify for our standard rate tier. Applicants who do not meet these criteria may still be considered for a secured loan option or may reapply after improving their credit profile.

Wire transfers initiated before 3:00 PM Eastern Time on a business day will typically be processed the same day. Transfers initiated after this cutoff, or on weekends and holidays, will be processed on the next available business day. International wire transfers may take an additional 1-3 business days depending on the receiving bank and country.

Customers enrolled in overdraft protection will have eligible transactions covered up to a limit of $500, subject to a $10 overdraft fee per transaction, with a maximum of three overdraft fees charged per day. Customers can opt out of overdraft protection at any time through the mobile app or by visiting a branch, after which transactions exceeding the available balance will simply be declined.
